author: anon-2101b8a8
content: Delivered: GAP-REPORT.md — comprehensive gap analysis covering all 10 sklearn module segments. Summary: ~35% overall coverage (125/360 items). Strongest: Naive Bayes 80%, Clustering 71%, Decomposition 50%. Weakest: Metrics 24%, Uncovered modules 7%. Report includes priority tiers for future work and a section on ferrolearn features that go beyond sklearn.
